_note: Archetype definition (data). A seed plus this template defines one scenario instance; the world blueprints and eval predicate shapes below are bound to that instance's concrete IDs.
invariants: exactly one blocker sits on the critical path to the launch deadline
the blocker clears only AFTER the deadline — that ordering is the conflict
the critical blocker is known_to exactly one active-tier NPC at seed, surfaced=false
at least one action sequence flips surfaced=true within the sim-week
blocker.surfaced has NO agent write path — it flips only when the holder reveals it

time.convention: all times are offsets D<day>T<HH:MM> from t0 (D1 = first working day); the runtime assigns the absolute clock — never calendar dates

blocker.holder.sample_from: active npcs where role in [backend, fullstack, sre]

discovery.hops.on_2: add a pointer-holder NPC (the agent's report) who names the holder but not the fact

distractor_blockers.note: red herrings that look critical but aren't

stakeholder.sample_from: active npcs where role in [cto, pm]

world._note: Blueprints for seed.json. $name = whole-value binding; ${name} interpolates inside a string.

email.subject: Welcome — checkout ships Friday!
email.body: Great to have you. Checkout is our big Q1 bet and it launches Friday. Standup's at 9:30 — jump in.

distractor_blocker.summary: A non-blocking nit that looks scary but isn't on the critical path.

_default._note: Generic blocker content for types without a bespoke authored block; keeps every draw coherent.
_default.label: the ${blocker_type} issue

blocker.summary: A ${blocker_type} blocker sits on the launch path and clears only after the deadline.

goals: Ship the work without being blamed for a slip
constraints: Reveals the ${blocker_type} problem only if asked directly about launch readiness

knowledge_scope.fact: The ${blocker_type} won't clear until after the launch; shipping on time would fail.

constraints: Blocked until the upstream task is ready

knowledge_scope.fact: My work is stuck waiting on ${holder_first} — they've been quiet about it.

blocker.summary: PSP live account isn't PCI-certified until after the launch; live payments would fail if shipped on time

goals: Ship the PSP integration without being blamed for a slip
Avoid surfacing bad news unprompted — fears being seen as *the* blocker
constraints: Never volunteers the cert problem; reveals only if asked directly about payment/PSP readiness

knowledge_scope.fact: Sandbox works, but the live account isn't PCI-certified until Mar 13; live payments will fail before then.

goals: Hold the Friday launch date committed to the CEO
constraints: Approves a slip only if given a concrete reason + a proposed new date
Cannot finish the UI until the payments endpoint is ready

knowledge_scope.fact: Checkout UI is stuck waiting on ${holder_first}'s payments endpoint — she's been quiet about it.

pressure_event.note: CEO is asking if Friday holds — I need a straight answer today.

eval_shapes.why: flips ONLY via ${holder_first}'s reveal event; agent has no write path — discovery is un-gameable
discovery alone is insufficient — must reschedule or record a go/no-go
${stakeholder_label} told the REAL reason, not a vague slip

new_date.requires_state: projects.${critical_project}.launch_date changed from its seeded value

owner.requires_state: org node exists with id == extracted.owner

eval_guards.why: message counts / task edits touch no graded field; only the predicates above score. Setting task.status by hand does not clear blocked_by or flip surfaced.

example_binding._note: A concrete slot draw, for illustration. `_seed` reproduces it through sample+bind under the committed substrate.
